action.reasoning: Observation: 57.45% avg accuracy with ResNet-18, significant forgetting (task 0: 56.5%, task 3: 46.9% vs task 7: 68.7%). Analysis: Feature drift in the backbone causes catastrophic forgetting. Decision: Switch to frozen CLIP ViT-B/16 feature extractor + linear classifier with full feature replay. This eliminates feature drift entirely and is very fast to train.
